summary: Iteration 146: All 3 gap-fixes verified working. (1) EchoStratus HIGH-priority plans auto-generate team_notifications with source='stratus', (2) Aurium GM composite_health_score now includes pattern_risk_score (20% weight), (3) AI³ chat _gather_context_for_query includes Pattern Intelligence snapshot + keyword expansion. 26/26 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: EchoAurium GM panel renders PatternInlineWidget (full variant) with risk badge, 4 totals grid, and 'Open Panel' button. EchoStratus Forecast panel renders compact PatternInlineWidget. Pattern Intelligence panel renders all sections.

issues: Syntax errors in LayerMaskDialog.tsx, BatchProcessingPanel.tsx, GenerativeFillDialog.tsx - not blocking main app but should be fixed

critical_code_review_comments: GAP FIX 1: patterns.py lines 337-380 correctly creates team_notifications for HIGH-priority stratus plans with source='stratus', plan_id reference, and deduplication check
GAP FIX 2: intelligence_adapter.py lines 326-348 correctly integrates pattern_risk_score into composite_health_score formula (20% weight)
GAP FIX 3: ai3_nlp.py lines 83-94 and 152-175 correctly inject Pattern Intelligence snapshot and expand keywords for pattern/recurring/drift queries
PatternInlineWidget.tsx correctly implements both 'compact' and 'full' variants with data-testid attributes
EchoAuriumGMPanel.tsx correctly renders PatternInlineWidget with variant='full'
EchoStratusForecastPanel.tsx correctly renders PatternInlineWidget with variant='compact'

verified_features.STRATUS_team_notifications_creation: PASS - POST /api/patterns/stratus-recommendations creates team_notifications for HIGH-priority plans with source='stratus'
verified_features.STRATUS_notification_structure: PASS - Stratus notifications have source='stratus', target, plan_id, to (role), acknowledged=false
verified_features.STRATUS_notification_deduplication: PASS - Does not duplicate existing open stratus notifications for same target in window
verified_features.TEAM_NOTIFICATIONS_both_sources: PASS - GET /api/concierge/team-notifications returns both stratus and concierge sourced notifications
verified_features.TEAM_NOTIFICATIONS_ack_stratus: PASS - POST /api/concierge/team-notifications/{id}/ack works on stratus-sourced notifications
verified_features.AI3_recurring_issues_context: PASS - POST /api/ai3/ask with 'recurring issues in room 301' returns contextual response with pattern data
verified_features.AI3_outlet_drift_context: PASS - POST /api/ai3/ask with 'outlet drift' query returns contextual response
verified_features.AI3_pattern_keywords: PASS - Pattern-related keywords (pattern, recurring, drift, trend, cluster) trigger context injection
verified_features.REGRESSION_inline_summary: PASS - GET /api/patterns/inline-summary returns risk_score, totals, top_recurring, top_assets, top_drift, top_repeat_guests
verified_features.REGRESSION_recurring_issues: PASS - GET /api/patterns/recurring-issues returns items with room_no, category, count, sources
verified_features.REGRESSION_guest_complaints: PASS - GET /api/patterns/guest-complaint-history returns guests with 2+ tickets
verified_features.REGRESSION_asset_clusters: PASS - GET /api/patterns/asset-failure-clusters returns categories with count, avg_revenue_at_risk
verified_features.REGRESSION_outlet_drift: PASS - GET /api/patterns/outlet-drift returns outlets with drift > 1 min
verified_features.REGRESSION_concierge_intake: PASS - POST /api/concierge/intake creates ticket, routes to domain, returns guest_history_count
verified_features.REGRESSION_concierge_vip_notification: PASS - VIP concierge intake creates team_notification to front_office_manager
verified_features.FRONTEND_aurium_gm_panel: PASS - EchoAurium GM panel loads with composite_health_score, readiness, engineering, FOH, concierge metrics
verified_features.FRONTEND_aurium_pattern_widget_full: PASS - PatternInlineWidget (full variant) renders in Aurium GM with risk badge, 4 totals, top recurring/assets/drift/guests grids
verified_features.FRONTEND_aurium_open_panel_button: PASS - 'Open Panel' button (data-testid='open-pattern-intelligence') present and dispatches event
verified_features.FRONTEND_stratus_forecast_panel: PASS - EchoStratus Forecast panel loads with totals and weekly forecast table
verified_features.FRONTEND_stratus_pattern_widget_compact: PASS - PatternInlineWidget (compact variant) renders in Stratus with risk badge and 2 summary lines
verified_features.FRONTEND_pattern_intelligence_panel: PASS - Pattern Intelligence panel renders all sections: Team Notifications, Recurring Issues, Guest Complaints, Asset Clusters, Outlet Drift
verified_features.SECURITY_no_id_leak: PASS - No MongoDB _id leaked in any tested endpoint

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed concierge tickets for VIP notification testing. Stratus recommendations auto-created team_notifications with source='stratus'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 146 adds 3 gap-fixes: (1) EchoStratus HIGH-priority plans now auto-generate team_notifications with source='stratus' in patterns.py lines 337-380, (2) Aurium GM composite_health_score now includes pattern_risk_score (20% weight) in intelligence_adapter.py lines 326-348, (3) AI³ chat context injection includes Pattern Intelligence snapshot in ai3_nlp.py lines 83-94 and keyword expansion in lines 152-175. Frontend PatternInlineWidget.tsx supports 'compact' and 'full' variants. EchoAuriumGMPanel.tsx uses full variant, EchoStratusForecastPanel.tsx uses compact variant. All data-testid attributes present for testing. Note: EchoCanvasStudio has syntax errors in 3 files but does not block main app functionality.
